GM:(0,0,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  T:(1,0,0)  Y:(0,1,0)  Z:(0,0,1)
GM:(0,0,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  T:(1,0,0)  Y:(0,1,0)  Z:(0,0,1)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM4+  GM4-  GM3+  GM3-  GM5  GM6  L1-L1+  L2L3  T1+  T1-  T2+  T2-  T4+  T4-  T3+  T3-  T5  T6  Y1+  Y1-  Y2+  Y2-  Y4+  Y4-  Y3+  Y3-  Y5  Y6  Z1+  Z1-  Z2+  Z2-  Z4+  Z4-  Z3+  Z3-  Z5  Z6
1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 2 2 2 2 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 2 2 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 2 2 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 2 2
